transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I'm calling on behalf of my grandmother. She's 80 and needs a general physician. She hasn't been eating well lately and feels very weak.
AGENT: Thank you for looking out for her. Dr. Sheela Nair is our senior general physician who's wonderful with elderly patients. She's available today at 4 PM — would that work?
CALLER: Today itself? That's actually great. Yes please.
AGENT: Wonderful. What's your grandmother's name?
CALLER: Kamakshi Subramanian.
AGENT: And your contact number?
CALLER: My number is 8561234790.
AGENT: Confirmed! Mrs. Kamakshi Subramanian with Dr. Sheela Nair today at 4 PM. Please bring a list of any medications she's currently on, even OTC ones. This helps a lot.
CALLER: Yes, I'll bring all of them. Thank you so much.
AGENT: Wishing your grandmother a quick improvement. See you this afternoon!
